name: Minimal
prompt_hint: Use a minimal, typographic theme. Pure white background, black text, no decoration, no shadows, no colors except black and shades of gray. Focus on typography hierarchy — large headings, generous line height, clean spacing. Border-bottom on headings only. Monospace for code. Use inline CSS in a <style> tag only — no external CDN, no <script> tags.
print_css: @media print { button[id='regenerate'] { display: none !important; } @page { margin: 2.5cm; size: A4; } }
